subcodes.first_line: By the life of God, whenever this lowly servant seeketh to praise his Lord, he perceiveth and beholdeth that the very essence of praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله ان الخادم الفانی کلما یرید ان یحمد ربه یری و یشاهد بان کینونه الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
